creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
Zope Hotfixes are Products that installed in the Product directory. 
No changes are made to the distributed source or installed files. 

So there is no need to install the hotfix with the zope install. 

Instances may choose not to include the global Products dir, so 
the Hotfix installed there will not be used. 

I have no Problems with the HotFix installed with zope but I see
no need for it. Since the work is already done i have no objection 
to include it in the port.
